hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.py"' || echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.py$'; then file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+\.py"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then uv run ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi
hooks.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff after edit

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+\.py"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then if grep -n 'print(' "$file" | grep -v 'structlog\|logger\|#.*print\|".*print' | head -3; then echo '[WARN] print() detected — use structlog get_logger(__name__) instead (CLAUDE.md Rule 6)'; fi; fi
hooks.description: Warn if print() used without structlog

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/execution/|src/risk/veto_gate|ibkr_client|crypto_client|credential|secret|password|api.key'; then echo '[SECURITY] Sensitive file modified: '"$file"' — consider running /python-review or security-reviewer agent'; fi; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/agents/|src/risk/|src/execution/|src/services/trading_service|src/services/position_monitor|src/services/crypto_trading|src/data/'; then echo '[TRADING] Trading-critical file modified: '"$file"' — run /trading-review before committing'; fi; fi
hooks.description: Remind to run /trading-review for trading-critical file changes

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_USE" | grep -q 'Write'; then file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '^.*/src/.*\.py$'; then module=$(basename "$file" .py); testfile=$(dirname "$file" | sed 's|/src/|/tests/test_|;s|/|_|g')"_${module}.py"; if [ ! -f "$testfile" ]; then testfile2="tests/test_${module}.py"; if [ ! -f "$testfile2" ]; then echo '[TDD] New source file created without matching test. Write tests first! (CLAUDE.md Rule 3)'; fi; fi; fi; fi
hooks.description: TDD reminder when creating new source files without tests

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'migrations/|src/db/|_store\.py$'; then echo '[DB] Database-related file modified: '"$file"' — consider running database-reviewer agent for schema/query review'; fi; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'pip install|pip freeze|pip uninstall|python -m pip'; then echo '[WARN] pip usage detected — ALWAYS use uv (uv add, uv sync, uv run). See CLAUDE.md Rule 2.'; fi
hooks.description: Catch pip usage in bash commands
